authors: Shahira S. Fahmy Laila Abbas Aliaa K. ElShabassy a The American University in Cairo
raw_title: TikToking the Israel-Gaza War: A Content Analysis of Peace and War Narratives in Audiovisual News
title_en: TikToking the Israel-Gaza War: A Content Analysis of Peace and War Narratives in Audiovisual News
title_zh: TikTok上的以色列-加沙战争：视听新闻中和平与战争叙事的内容分析
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究分析了TikTok上关于以色列-加沙战争的视听新闻内容，重点研究其中和平与战争两种叙事的表现方式。
plain_summary_en: This study analyzes audiovisual news content about the Israel-Gaza War on TikTok, focusing on how peace and war narratives are presented.
research_direction_zh: 社交媒体平台上的冲突新闻叙事研究，特别是短视频平台如何塑造战争报道和公众认知。
research_direction_en: Research on conflict news narratives on social media platforms, particularly how short-video platforms shape war reporting and public perception.
